title: Craftable Capes
description: Craft and wear any cape you want!
body:
Makes all the capes craftable.  
Yes, ALL the capes, including all the vanilla capes, personal capes, deleted capes, temporary capes, April Fools capes, Bedrock exclusive capes, Legacy Xbox 360 capes and Minecraft Dungeons capes.  

This mod is written in a way that should allow compatability with other cape mods by simply overwriting the cape texture requests in vanilla Minecraft. Here's a list of tested compatible and incompatible mods:  
### Compatible:
* [Wavey Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes)  

### Incompatible:
* [More Banner Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-banner-features) - Causes capes to not render

Capes are crafted using wool and cape specific items. Recipes can be accessed using the recipe book after picking up any piece of wool or by using mods like [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei), [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), or [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wxd6uaXJ/images/62ae1df5706f03dd8b30400a83f06584c5d2287c.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wxd6uaXJ/images/62ae1df5706f03dd8b30400a83f06584c5d2287c.png)  

Capes released before the Elytra was added to the game also have brand new textures for the Elytra.  
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wxd6uaXJ/images/069eab2e0fbd399d6299444028b959a3d18ff921.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wxd6uaXJ/images/069eab2e0fbd399d6299444028b959a3d18ff921.png)

Capes can be equipped in the cape trinket slot from [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)/[Trinkets Canary](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-canary) in 1.21.4+  
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wxd6uaXJ/images/3063263556f70ec57f20a3fd580fd29cb585b4dc.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wxd6uaXJ/images/3063263556f70ec57f20a3fd580fd29cb585b4dc.png)
